hero.eyebrow: Industrial Cooling Engineering Partner — EMEA & Beyond
hero.subtitle: From feasibility to commissioning — one accountable partner for EPC firms, industrial investors and cold chain operators.

why.title: Built on Engineering Expertise. Trusted Across Industries.
why.v1_desc: Single point of contact from feasibility and specification through procurement, installation, and commissioning.
why.v2_desc: PE-stamped specifications, compliance documentation, and thermal load engineering across all product lines.
why.v3_desc: Delivered projects across Europe, Middle East, Africa and the Caucasus with proven logistics capability.
why.v4_desc: RFQ response within 48 hours with full BOQ traceability and engineering documentation.
why.v5_desc: Turnkey solutions integrating refrigeration, insulation, structural steel and logistics infrastructure.

solutions.title: Cold Storage Systems Engineered for Performance
solutions.chilled_desc: Temperature-controlled environments for fresh produce, dairy, and pharmaceutical storage with precision monitoring.
solutions.frozen_desc: Full cold chain frozen storage systems for meat, seafood, and industrial food processing facilities.
solutions.blast_desc: Rapid freeze technology for high-throughput processing lines with automated temperature profiling.

food.short: Complete cold storage and refrigeration solutions for food processing plants, beverage facilities and distribution centres.
food.subtitle: End-to-end cold chain solutions engineered for food safety, HACCP compliance and operational efficiency.
food.title: Cold Chain Solutions for Food & Beverage
food.description: ARCOPAN provides turnkey cold storage solutions for the food and beverage industry — from raw material reception and processing to distribution. Our systems are designed to maintain strict temperature control, ensure food safety compliance, and maximise energy efficiency across the entire cold chain.
food.feature1: HACCP-compliant cold room design and construction
food.feature4: Integrated dock systems for seamless logistics

meat.short: Specialised cold rooms, blast freezers and hanging rail systems for meat processing and poultry operations.
meat.subtitle: Purpose-built refrigeration systems for meat processing, carcass handling and frozen storage.
meat.title: Cold Storage for Meat & Poultry Processing
meat.description: ARCOPAN delivers cold storage systems specifically engineered for meat and poultry operations. From slaughterhouse chill rooms to blast freezing tunnels and long-term frozen storage, our solutions maintain the strict temperature profiles required for food safety and product quality throughout the processing chain.
meat.feature1: Hanging rail systems for carcass chilling rooms
meat.feature2: Blast freezing tunnels for rapid temperature reduction
meat.feature4: Compliant with EU and international food safety standards
meat.product1: PIR Panels with Stainless Steel Facing
meat.product2: Heavy-Duty Sliding Doors for Meat Processing

dairy.short: Temperature-controlled environments for milk processing, cheese maturation rooms and dairy product storage.
dairy.subtitle: Precision climate control for dairy processing, maturation and cold chain distribution.
dairy.title: Refrigeration Systems for Dairy Industry
dairy.description: ARCOPAN provides controlled-environment solutions tailored to the dairy industry's unique requirements. Our systems support milk reception and cooling, cheese and yoghurt maturation at precise humidity and temperature levels, and cold distribution storage — all designed to extend shelf life and maintain product integrity.
dairy.feature1: Precision temperature and humidity control for maturation
dairy.feature2: Milk reception and rapid cooling systems
dairy.product1: PUR Insulated Panels with Food-Grade Coating

pharma.short: GDP/GMP-compliant cold storage for pharmaceuticals, vaccines and medical supplies with full temperature traceability.
pharma.subtitle: Validated cold storage systems meeting pharmaceutical GDP and GMP requirements.
pharma.title: Pharmaceutical Cold Chain Solutions
pharma.description: ARCOPAN designs and builds cold storage facilities that meet the stringent requirements of the pharmaceutical industry. Our systems ensure GDP/GMP compliance with validated temperature mapping, redundant cooling, alarm systems and full audit trail documentation — critical for vaccine storage, clinical trials and pharmaceutical distribution.
pharma.feature2: Redundant cooling systems with automatic failover
pharma.feature4: Full audit trail and compliance documentation

logistics.short: Cold chain logistics infrastructure including dock systems, loading bays, insulated warehouses and fleet pre-cooling.
logistics.subtitle: Complete cold chain logistics infrastructure from dock to warehouse to last-mile delivery.
logistics.title: Cold Chain Logistics Infrastructure
logistics.description: ARCOPAN delivers end-to-end cold chain logistics solutions for distribution centres, 3PL operators and transport hubs. Our systems cover every touchpoint — from insulated dock shelters and levellers to temperature-controlled storage zones and fleet pre-cooling areas — ensuring unbroken cold chain integrity from loading to delivery.
logistics.feature1: Insulated dock shelters and hydraulic dock levellers
logistics.product3: Pallet Racking Systems for Cold Storage

retail.short: Commercial refrigeration and back-store cold rooms for supermarkets, hypermarkets and convenience store chains.
retail.subtitle: Retail-grade cold storage and display refrigeration for modern food retail.
retail.title: Supermarket & Retail Cold Storage
retail.description: ARCOPAN provides complete cold storage solutions for the retail sector — from back-of-store cold rooms and preparation areas to integration-ready systems for commercial display refrigeration. Our modular panel systems allow rapid installation during store fit-outs while maintaining energy efficiency and regulatory compliance.
retail.feature1: Modular cold rooms for rapid store fit-out
retail.feature2: Separate chilled and frozen back-store zones
retail.feature4: Compatible with commercial display cabinet systems

cta.title: Ready to Engineer Your Cold Chain?
cta.subtitle: From feasibility assessment to final commissioning — submit your project requirements and receive an engineering consultation within 48 hours.
